title: Toddler Behavior
description: This episode examines the cultural and philosophical assumptions that shape how early childhood professionals respond to toddler behavior, and explores what developmental science and cross-cultural research suggest about more effective, regulation-focused approaches.

title: Early Autism Live Workshop
description: A live Q&A exploring early autism — what we know, what we're still learning.

title: Picky Eating
description: This episode explores picky eating in early childhood — how it differs from feeding disorders, what the research says about its origins, and which strategies are most supported for helping young children expand their diets without creating mealtime conflict.
